name: Day 2 No-Deploy Revenue Experiment

truth.real_signal: PLAUD affiliate program route response exists

decision: Do not depend on portal deploy for revenue. Use direct payment routes and partner/application routes while deploy remains unconfirmed.

active_routes.goal: affiliate application path and creator angle

agent_orders.order: Keep status non-green until money, subscription, real lead, payment click, deploy confirmation or booked call exists.
Prioritize AI productivity gadgets, creator-commerce tools, and AI builders because current reply signal points there.
Rewrite generic automation into a narrow promise: turn product attention into affiliate or paid workflow revenue.
If Gmail sending or deploy is blocked, create assets and application-route records instead of operator tasks.
